name: Bye-Bye Birdy Curry Dip
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Fresh Pineapple, crushed (or 8 1/4 oz pineapple, crushed and drained well)
recipeInstructions:
1. Use Gorgonzola cheese if available; otherwise, any blue-veined cheese will do.
2. Mix the water and lemon juice in a small bowl. Slice the Granny Smith apple and put the slices into the lemon water to soak. Set aside.
3. In a serving bowl, combine the mayonnaise with celery, crushed pineapple (or drained pineapple), curry powder, salt, and black pepper. Blend well.
4. Fold in the chopped cashews. Remove the apple slices from the lemon water and dice them.
5. Stir the diced apples into the mixture, then stir in the Gorgonzola cheese, blending well.
6. Cover and chill. Makes about 2 cups of dip.
7. Suggested dippers: Pita triangles, bread chunks, radishes, scallions, turnips, bell peppers.
